caption: Whataburger On a Diet #whataburger #fastfood #diet #lowcalorie #reels
ocr_summary: Whataburger Low Calorie High Protein Meal. Under 600 calories with almost 50 grams of protein. Chicken Fajita Taco, 4 piece chicken nuggets, buffalo sauce, Coke Zero. Nutrition label: Calories 600, Protein 49g.
visual_scenes: Man outside Whataburger ordering at drive-through. Shows menu board, ordering interaction. Then inside showing the food: chicken fajita taco and chicken nuggets. Nutrition label overlay at end showing ~600 cal, 49g protein.
